text.title: Prompt Portability Audit Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from scope freeze to committed audit report.

step.name: freeze-scope
step.action: Pin `scope_paths` list with git sha. No additions mid-audit (rule r1).

step.name: scan-for-lock-in
step.action: For each prompt: grep for Claude XML tags, OpenAI developer role, Gemini safety blocks, refusal-style markers. Tag each hit with criterion id.

step.name: severity-and-owner
step.input: raw findings + severity policy + ownership map
step.action: Assign severity (low/medium/high) per finding; assign owner + deadline (ISO date).
step.decision-gate: every finding has severity+owner+deadline+evidence (rule r3, r4)
